item.title: 快速收納30+招懶人包！誰不嚮往一個整齊的家？必學30+招快速收納大全！推薦收納好物清單彙整，衣櫃、廚房、冰箱及客廳居家全區收納技巧｜收納改造研究室｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: 快速收納30+招懶人包！誰不嚮往一個整齊的家？必學30+招快速收納大全！推薦收納好物清單彙整，衣櫃、廚房、冰箱及客廳居家全區收納技巧｜收納改造研究室｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UD3TN7BmjcY 你家也是亂糟糟嗎？居家環境髒亂其實可以從一些小地方來改善，今天統整了30招以上，廚房、冰箱、衣櫃各區的快速收納技巧，還會列出推薦的收納好物清單唷！ -- 🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍影片目錄 00:00｜影片開始 00:39｜快速收納技巧1：廚房瓶罐收納 01:10｜快速收納技巧2：高處使用附把手收納籃 01:38｜快速收納技巧3：伸縮桿+S掛勾懸空收納 01:56｜快速收納技巧4：平底鍋直立收納 02:09｜快速收納技巧5：碗盤直立收納 03:14｜快速收納技巧6：鍋蓋立放好物 03:46｜快速收納技巧7：抽屜用收納盒分隔 05:35｜快速收納技巧8：網片diy自製收納牆 06:12｜快速收納技巧9：冰箱側邊磁吸收納 06:46｜快速收納技巧10：廚下收納用分層架 07:56｜快速收納技巧11：統一調味料罐油罐 09:08｜快速收納技巧12：垃圾袋、保鮮袋收納 10:38｜快速收納技巧13：保鮮盒系統化收納 12:05｜快速收納技巧14：收納盒變身小抽屜 12:44｜快速收納技巧15：袋裝食材用文件架 13:18｜快速收納技巧16：蔬果區用紙袋分隔 13:47｜快速收納技巧17：海鮮、絞肉冷凍收納 14:14｜快速收納技巧18：冷凍分裝小物 矽膠膜 14:33｜快速收納技巧19：冷凍分裝小物 烘焙紙 15:06｜快速收納技巧20：漂亮蛋糕保存法 15:37｜快速收納技巧21：衣櫃內增加收納量 16:02｜快速收納技巧22：直立收納空間多一半 16:20｜快速收納技巧23：上衣直立折法 16:57｜快速收納技巧24：褲子直立折法 17:17｜快速收納技巧25：連身長裙收納 17:50｜快速收納技巧26：毛衣收納 18:29｜快速收納技巧27：襪子收納 19:26｜快速收納技巧28：帽子收納 19:53｜快速收納技巧29：包包收納 20:12｜快速收納技巧30：diy玄關收納空間 21:17｜快速收納技巧31：玄關信件整理區 21:36｜快速收納技巧32：3C設備充電站 21:56｜快速收納技巧33：掛勾收納電線 22:19｜快速收納技巧34：懸空收納小物 23:01｜快速收納技巧35：化妝品、保養品收納 📍系列影片 開箱評測｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #廚房收納 #冰箱收納 #衣物收納 #洞洞板 #保鮮盒 #標籤機 #無印好物 #大創好物 #ikea好物 #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UD3TN7BmjcY 你家也是亂糟糟嗎？居家環境髒亂其實可以從一些小地方來改善，今天統整了30招以上，廚房、冰箱、衣櫃各區的快速收納技巧，還會列出推薦的收納好物清單唷！ -- 🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍影片目錄 00:00｜影片開始 00:39｜快速收納技巧1：廚房瓶罐收納 01:10｜快速收納技巧2：高處使用附把手收納籃 01:38｜快速收納技巧3：伸縮桿+S掛勾懸空收納 01:56｜快速收納技巧4：平底鍋直立收納 02:09｜快速收納技巧5：碗盤直立收納 03:14｜快速收納技巧6：鍋蓋立放好物 03:46｜快速收納技巧7：抽屜用收納盒分隔 05:35｜快速收納技巧8：網片diy自製收納牆 06:12｜快速收納技巧9：冰箱側邊磁吸收納 06:46｜快速收納技巧10：廚下收納用分層架 07:56｜快速收納技巧11：統一調味料罐油罐 09:08｜快速收納技巧12：垃圾袋、保鮮袋收納 10:38｜快速收納技巧13：保鮮盒系統化收納 12:05｜快速收納技巧14：收納盒變身小抽屜 12:44｜快速收納技巧15：袋裝食材用文件架 13:18｜快速收納技巧16：蔬果區用紙袋分隔 13:47｜快速收納技巧17：海鮮、絞肉冷凍收納 14:14｜快速收納技巧18：冷凍分裝小物 矽膠膜 14:33｜快速收納技巧19：冷凍分裝小物 烘焙紙 15:06｜快速收納技巧20：漂亮蛋糕保存法 15:37｜快速收納技巧21：衣櫃內增加收納量 16:02｜快速收納技巧22：直立收納空間多一半 16:20｜快速收納技巧23：上衣直立折法 16:57｜快速收納技巧24：褲子直立折法 17:17｜快速收納技巧25：連身長裙收納 17:50｜快速收納技巧26：毛衣收納 18:29｜快速收納技巧27：襪子收納 19:26｜快速收納技巧28：帽子收納 19:53｜快速收納技巧29：包包收納 20:12｜快速收納技巧30：diy玄關收納空間 21:17｜快速收納技巧31：玄關信件整理區 21:36｜快速收納技巧32：3C設備充電站 21:56｜快速收納技巧33：掛勾收納電線 22:19｜快速收納技巧34：懸空收納小物 23:01｜快速收納技巧35：化妝品、保養品收納 📍系列影片 開箱評測｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #廚房收納 #冰箱收納 #衣物收納 #洞洞板 #保鮮盒 #標籤機 #無印好物 #大創好物 #ikea好物 #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UD3TN7BmjcY
你家也是亂糟糟嗎？居家環境髒亂其實可以從一些小地方來改善，今天統整了30招以上，廚房、冰箱、衣櫃各區的快速收納技巧，還會列出推薦的收納好物清單唷！
--
🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup
👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT
㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT

📍影片目錄
00:00｜影片開始
00:39｜快速收納技巧1：廚房瓶罐收納
01:10｜快速收納技巧2：高處使用附把手收納籃
01:38｜快速收納技巧3：伸縮桿+S掛勾懸空收納
01:56｜快速收納技巧4：平底鍋直立收納
02:09｜快速收納技巧5：碗盤直立收納
03:14｜快速收納技巧6：鍋蓋立放好物
03:46｜快速收納技巧7：抽屜用收納盒分隔
05:35｜快速收納技巧8：網片diy自製收納牆
06:12｜快速收納技巧9：冰箱側邊磁吸收納
06:46｜快速收納技巧10：廚下收納用分層架
07:56｜快速收納技巧11：統一調味料罐油罐
09:08｜快速收納技巧12：垃圾袋、保鮮袋收納
10:38｜快速收納技巧13：保鮮盒系統化收納
12:05｜快速收納技巧14：收納盒變身小抽屜
12:44｜快速收納技巧15：袋裝食材用文件架
13:18｜快速收納技巧16：蔬果區用紙袋分隔
13:47｜快速收納技巧17：海鮮、絞肉冷凍收納
14:14｜快速收納技巧18：冷凍分裝小物 矽膠膜
14:33｜快速收納技巧19：冷凍分裝小物 烘焙紙
15:06｜快速收納技巧20：漂亮蛋糕保存法
15:37｜快速收納技巧21：衣櫃內增加收納量
16:02｜快速收納技巧22：直立收納空間多一半
16:20｜快速收納技巧23：上衣直立折法
16:57｜快速收納技巧24：褲子直立折法
17:17｜快速收納技巧25：連身長裙收納
17:50｜快速收納技巧26：毛衣收納
18:29｜快速收納技巧27：襪子收納
19:26｜快速收納技巧28：帽子收納
19:53｜快速收納技巧29：包包收納
20:12｜快速收納技巧30：diy玄關收納空間
21:17｜快速收納技巧31：玄關信件整理區
21:36｜快速收納技巧32：3C設備充電站
21:56｜快速收納技巧33：掛勾收納電線
22:19｜快速收納技巧34：懸空收納小物
23:01｜快速收納技巧35：化妝品、保養品收納

📍系列影片
開箱評測｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT
生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT
收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT

🐸 About us 🐸
訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT
追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT
加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT
加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT
加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT
按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT
請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw

#廚房收納 #冰箱收納 #衣物收納
#洞洞板 #保鮮盒 #標籤機
#無印好物 #大創好物 #ikea好物
#蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招

item.title: 拯救混亂辦公桌！IKEA、無印良品、宜得利辦公收納好物推薦 & 收納布置３妙招首度公開，雨傘、拖鞋、便當袋、安全帽居然都有它們的家！｜收納改造研究室｜waja蛙家
item.itunes:title: 拯救混亂辦公桌！IKEA、無印良品、宜得利辦公收納好物推薦 & 收納布置３妙招首度公開，雨傘、拖鞋、便當袋、安全帽居然都有它們的家！｜收納改造研究室｜waja蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ioIMiNpHHoI It's really messy enough, no wonder I can't find things often The battle to save the desk has begun, now let's help colleagues with special training, To store and transform this messy desk, This time even umbrellas, slippers, bento bags, and hard hats have their homes, Let the desk not only heal but also be more practical! 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 01:10｜Desk storage and arrangement removed 02:05｜Storage supplies location planning and placement 02:47｜Storage supplies put on shelves 05:55｜Storage in the drawer area 08:22｜Desk layout 08:47｜3 small inspirations for storage and arrangement 10:26｜Summary
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ioIMiNpHHoI It's really messy enough, no wonder I can't find things often The battle to save the desk has begun, now let's help colleagues with special training, To store and transform this messy desk, This time even umbrellas, slippers, bento bags, and hard hats have their homes, Let the desk not only heal but also be more practical! 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 01:10｜Desk storage and arrangement removed 02:05｜Storage supplies location planning and placement 02:47｜Storage supplies put on shelves 05:55｜Storage in the drawer area 08:22｜Desk layout 08:47｜3 small inspirations for storage and arrangement 10:26｜Summary
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ioIMiNpHHoI
It's really messy enough, no wonder I can't find things often
The battle to save the desk has begun, now let's help colleagues with special training,
To store and transform this messy desk,
This time even umbrellas, slippers, bento bags, and hard hats have their homes,
Let the desk not only heal but also be more practical!

📍Video Directory
00:00｜The film starts
01:10｜Desk storage and arrangement removed
02:05｜Storage supplies location planning and placement
02:47｜Storage supplies put on shelves
05:55｜Storage in the drawer area
08:22｜Desk layout
08:47｜3 small inspirations for storage and arrangement
10:26｜Summary

item.title: 原來 LaLaport 裡面有大創旗艦店！一次逛足Standard Products、Daiso、Threeppy人氣品牌，多款日本產地直送商品、大創員工私堆好物開箱！｜開箱評測
item.itunes:title: 原來 LaLaport 裡面有大創旗艦店！一次逛足Standard Products、Daiso、Threeppy人氣品牌，多款日本產地直送商品、大創員工私堆好物開箱！｜開箱評測
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NudNG01IE1c What are some good things about Daiso? What are some great new brands? Wajia will take you to the Daiso flagship store today. In addition to Daiso, there are also Standard Products and Threeppy, three brands of must-buy items! What do you know? 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍Frog's Shrimp Skin Goods Recommended｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙More good news to be notified first! Join the community lock now｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 00:38｜Daiso flagship store environment introduction 00:56｜Daiso product introduction 01:09｜Daiso Longevity Cleanser \"Physiological Lotion\" 01:39｜Daiso's No. 1 sales \"Mold Removal Spray\" 02:14｜Japanese snack area and camping supplies 02:36｜Standard Products product introduction 03:00｜\"Knives from Seki City, Gifu Prefecture\" delivered directly from Japan 03:35｜\"Ehime Imabari Towel\" delivered directly from Japan 04:07｜Tableware from Tsubame City, Niigata Prefecture, delivered directly from Japan 04:34｜\"Glass Sealed Jar\" sold out as soon as it was put on the shelves 04:55｜Wenqing Style \"Various Storage Boxes\" 05:10｜Threeppy product introduction 05:33｜Girl Japanese Style \"High Quality Tableware\" 05:59｜Wabian recommends \"Microwavable Mug\" 06:21｜Employees privately recommend the good thing \"English Afternoon Tea Cup Set\" 06:38｜Authentic Disney Authorized Products that everyone likes 📍系列影片 開箱評測｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招 #開箱評測 #大創 #daiso #StandardProducts #Threeppy #lalaport
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NudNG01IE1c What are some good things about Daiso? What are some great new brands? Wajia will take you to the Daiso flagship store today. In addition to Daiso, there are also Standard Products and Threeppy, three brands of must-buy items! What do you know? 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍Frog's Shrimp Skin Goods Recommended｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙More good news to be notified first! Join the community lock now｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 00:38｜Daiso flagship store environment introduction 00:56｜Daiso product introduction 01:09｜Daiso Longevity Cleanser \"Physiological Lotion\" 01:39｜Daiso's No. 1 sales \"Mold Removal Spray\" 02:14｜Japanese snack area and camping supplies 02:36｜Standard Products product introduction 03:00｜\"Knives from Seki City, Gifu Prefecture\" delivered directly from Japan 03:35｜\"Ehime Imabari Towel\" delivered directly from Japan 04:07｜Tableware from Tsubame City, Niigata Prefecture, delivered directly from Japan 04:34｜\"Glass Sealed Jar\" sold out as soon as it was put on the shelves 04:55｜Wenqing Style \"Various Storage Boxes\" 05:10｜Threeppy product introduction 05:33｜Girl Japanese Style \"High Quality Tableware\" 05:59｜Wabian recommends \"Microwavable Mug\" 06:21｜Employees privately recommend the good thing \"English Afternoon Tea Cup Set\" 06:38｜Authentic Disney Authorized Products that everyone likes 📍系列影片 開箱評測｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招 #開箱評測 #大創 #daiso #StandardProducts #Threeppy #lalaport
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NudNG01IE1c
What are some good things about Daiso? What are some great new brands? Wajia will take you to the Daiso flagship store today. In addition to Daiso, there are also Standard Products and Threeppy, three brands of must-buy items! What do you know?

🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup

item.title: 出國旅行必備！無印良品、大創、蝦皮的11款超實用旅行收納品與小物推薦～｜開箱評測｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: 出國旅行必備！無印良品、大創、蝦皮的11款超實用旅行收納品與小物推薦～｜開箱評測｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WYWM0cKOq3E Every time I travel abroad, people look forward to it, but when faced with the clothes, belongings and other sundries in the suitcase, it is often a headache! In order to make your journey easier and more convenient, Wabian recommends 11 travel storage items for you. These carefully selected storage items can be purchased at MUJI, Daiso and Shopee. Let's take a look at these recommended products!
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WYWM0cKOq3E Every time I travel abroad, people look forward to it, but when faced with the clothes, belongings and other sundries in the suitcase, it is often a headache! In order to make your journey easier and more convenient, Wabian recommends 11 travel storage items for you. These carefully selected storage items can be purchased at MUJI, Daiso and Shopee. Let's take a look at these recommended products!
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WYWM0cKOq3E
Every time I travel abroad, people look forward to it, but when faced with the clothes, belongings and other sundries in the suitcase, it is often a headache! In order to make your journey easier and more convenient, Wabian recommends 11 travel storage items for you. These carefully selected storage items can be purchased at MUJI, Daiso and Shopee. Let's take a look at these recommended products!

item.title: 網路瘋傳影片大破解，你是不是相信了！這些7個小技巧是真的假的？｜勸世系列｜蛙家

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=02K6LMzs8yY Have you seen this kind of video on the Internet, a lot of tricks that can be sneaked, but have you actually applied it? Is it the same as the item on the Internet, which has a magical effect? Waja has collected seven online videos, and I want to help you test them. Are these skills true or false? 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍【Waja】 shrimp skin recommendation｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙ More good news to be notified first! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=02K6LMzs8yY
Have you seen this kind of video on the Internet, a lot of tricks that can be sneaked, but have you actually applied it? Is it the same as the item on the Internet, which has a magical effect? Waja has collected seven online videos, and I want to help you test them. Are these skills true or false?

04:43｜Too salty soup, put potatoes can absorb the salt
06:22｜Using salt + ginger + white vinegar can clean the mold on the cutting board
08:15｜ Two techniques, a big competition for oil removal!

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F-rm5ioSrnc You must have seen these mini appliances on the Internet. Are these small appliances for 2 to 3 people useful? Is it the same as the online videos? Don't get carried away, the frog family will take you to unpack the box and let you know whether these small appliances will step on thunder! 🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 00:20｜Product introduction of FURIMORI multifunctional instant cooker 00:56｜Instant Pot Cruel Test 02:01｜Comprehensive evaluation of instant cooker 02:28｜Introduction of Mini Electric Cup 03:12｜Cruel test of mini electric cup 04:11｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini electric cup 04:48｜Introduction of mini popcorn machine 05:28｜Cruel test of mini popcorn machine 06:22｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini popcorn machine 06:54｜Product introduction of mini folding washing machine 07:50｜Cruel test of mini folding washing machine 08:54｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini folding washing machine 📍系列影片 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招 #開箱評測 #迷你電器 #快煮鍋 #電熱杯 #摺疊洗衣機 # 爆米花機
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F-rm5ioSrnc You must have seen these mini appliances on the Internet. Are these small appliances for 2 to 3 people useful? Is it the same as the online videos? Don't get carried away, the frog family will take you to unpack the box and let you know whether these small appliances will step on thunder! 🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍Video Directory 00:00｜The film starts 00:20｜Product introduction of FURIMORI multifunctional instant cooker 00:56｜Instant Pot Cruel Test 02:01｜Comprehensive evaluation of instant cooker 02:28｜Introduction of Mini Electric Cup 03:12｜Cruel test of mini electric cup 04:11｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini electric cup 04:48｜Introduction of mini popcorn machine 05:28｜Cruel test of mini popcorn machine 06:22｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini popcorn machine 06:54｜Product introduction of mini folding washing machine 07:50｜Cruel test of mini folding washing machine 08:54｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini folding washing machine 📍系列影片 生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT 收納改造研究室｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 訂閱【蛙家】YouTube 頻道：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT 追蹤【蛙家】Instagram帳號：https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT 加入【生活好物研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 加入【收納改造研究室】社團：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT 加入【裝潢DIY研究室】社團：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT 按讚【蛙家的蛙粉棲息地】臉書粉絲專頁：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT 請洽【業務與合作聯繫】信箱：wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #蛙家 #收納改造研究室 #生活妙招 #開箱評測 #迷你電器 #快煮鍋 #電熱杯 #摺疊洗衣機 # 爆米花機
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F-rm5ioSrnc
You must have seen these mini appliances on the Internet. Are these small appliances for 2 to 3 people useful? Is it the same as the online videos? Don't get carried away, the frog family will take you to unpack the box and let you know whether these small appliances will step on thunder!

🔥追蹤IG看更多內容｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup
👍蛙家蝦皮好物推薦｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT
㊙更多好康搶先通知！快加入社團鎖定｜https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT


📍Video Directory
00:00｜The film starts
00:20｜Product introduction of FURIMORI multifunctional instant cooker
00:56｜Instant Pot Cruel Test
02:01｜Comprehensive evaluation of instant cooker
02:28｜Introduction of Mini Electric Cup
03:12｜Cruel test of mini electric cup
04:11｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini electric cup
04:48｜Introduction of mini popcorn machine
05:28｜Cruel test of mini popcorn machine
06:22｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini popcorn machine
06:54｜Product introduction of mini folding washing machine
07:50｜Cruel test of mini folding washing machine
08:54｜Comprehensive evaluation of mini folding washing machine


📍系列影片
生活智慧IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT

item.title: 浴室清潔祕訣大公開！30分鐘霉斑、髒汙、水垢一次K.O.！浴廁清潔程序＆技巧必看，打掃時間省一半！｜生活智慧IDEAS｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: 浴室清潔祕訣大公開！30分鐘霉斑、髒汙、水垢一次K.O.！浴廁清潔程序＆技巧必看，打掃時間省一半！｜生活智慧IDEAS｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbRaVQKA3F8 The bathroom is the place where moisture is most likely to be generated. If it accumulates for a long time without cleaning, it is prone to mildew and yellow stains, making it more difficult to clean. Routine once a week, only need to spend 30 minutes to clean each time, you can keep the bathroom fresh, cleaning is faster and more efficient! Let's quickly tidy up the bathroom with Wajia today!
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbRaVQKA3F8 The bathroom is the place where moisture is most likely to be generated. If it accumulates for a long time without cleaning, it is prone to mildew and yellow stains, making it more difficult to clean. Routine once a week, only need to spend 30 minutes to clean each time, you can keep the bathroom fresh, cleaning is faster and more efficient! Let's quickly tidy up the bathroom with Wajia today!
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbRaVQKA3F8
The bathroom is the place where moisture is most likely to be generated. If it accumulates for a long time without cleaning, it is prone to mildew and yellow stains, making it more difficult to clean. Routine once a week, only need to spend 30 minutes to clean each time, you can keep the bathroom fresh, cleaning is faster and more efficient! Let's quickly tidy up the bathroom with Wajia today!

item.title: WD40真的如傳說般神奇嗎？除鏽、潤滑、去污一瓶搞定？讓蛙編實測給你看！｜開箱評測｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: WD40真的如傳說般神奇嗎？除鏽、潤滑、去污一瓶搞定？讓蛙編實測給你看！｜開箱評測｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=299A7YVviOI Do you have this legendary can of WD40 at home? The super versatile WD40 can remove rust, lubricate, and decontaminate, it is simply a must-have artifact at home! But~ is it really as powerful as in the legend? Today, the frog family will come to the actual test to see! ※Remind everyone, when using WD40, remember to keep the room ventilated
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=299A7YVviOI Do you have this legendary can of WD40 at home? The super versatile WD40 can remove rust, lubricate, and decontaminate, it is simply a must-have artifact at home! But~ is it really as powerful as in the legend? Today, the frog family will come to the actual test to see! ※Remind everyone, when using WD40, remember to keep the room ventilated
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=299A7YVviOI
Do you have this legendary can of WD40 at home? The super versatile WD40 can remove rust, lubricate, and decontaminate, it is simply a must-have artifact at home! But~ is it really as powerful as in the legend? Today, the frog family will come to the actual test to see!
※Remind everyone, when using WD40, remember to keep the room ventilated

item.title: 討論度不高，但其實超好用的14個大創、宜得利、IKEA 生活好物！好口碑冷門好物都在這！沒打廣告也默默賣翻！｜勸世系列｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: 討論度不高，但其實超好用的14個大創、宜得利、IKEA 生活好物！好口碑冷門好物都在這！沒打廣告也默默賣翻！｜勸世系列｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: Watuber蛙家有個蛙土伯
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FdxwsHy3jr8 Some products are actually very useful, but the discussion is relatively low or relatively unpopular. This time, the editor of Wajia helped you find 14 Daiso, Yideli, and IKEA. It is relatively rare to hear the good things that everyone is discussing. Follow the editor Come and find out!
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FdxwsHy3jr8 Some products are actually very useful, but the discussion is relatively low or relatively unpopular. This time, the editor of Wajia helped you find 14 Daiso, Yideli, and IKEA. It is relatively rare to hear the good things that everyone is discussing. Follow the editor Come and find out!
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FdxwsHy3jr8
Some products are actually very useful, but the discussion is relatively low or relatively unpopular. This time, the editor of Wajia helped you find 14 Daiso, Yideli, and IKEA. It is relatively rare to hear the good things that everyone is discussing. Follow the editor Come and find out!
